name: Wilmot Collins
subject: Stand with 9/11 victims and first responders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
#
Friend,
When our nation came under attack on September 11, 2001, thousands of courageous firefighters, paramedics, EMTs, law enforcement officers, and more, facing unknown dangers, rushed into action to mitigate the damage, care for victims, and help prevent further casualties. These first responders are the definition of American heroes, and deserve our utmost respect.
Today, some of these first responders testified before Congress, sharing heart-wrenching stories about how their lives have been impacted in the years since the 9/11 attacks. Many of these men and women have developed cancer and other illnesses and require special care--but the 9/11 Victims Compensation Fund they rely on for health benefits is almost out of funding.
**[I'm joining our first responders in calling on Congress to pass the Never Forget the Heroes Act immediately to ensure our 9/11 first responders can access the care they need. I will always stand with our first responders--sign on now if you're with me.](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164711/1e3760f0/69b9759b/5f7eb4b5/3101960942/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/s/support-9-11-first-responders?source=em190611&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=")**
Time and again, Republicans in Congress have failed to honor our commitments to the brave 9/11 first responders who fearlessly rushed into danger to save as many lives as they could, with some in the GOP objecting to the victims' compensation fund before it ever even passed.
And many Republicans weren't even present for today's hearings. This is beyond shameful.
After the incredible sacrifice that these brave men and women made for our country, we owe it to these extraordinary first responders to fund the essential health care services that they need.
**[We need leaders in Congress who will stand with our first responders. I will make this one of my top priorities as your next Senator. Add your name now to join me in this fight.](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164711/1e3760f0/69b9759b/5f7eb4b5/3101960942/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/s/support-9-11-first-responders?source=em190611&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=")**
Thank you,
Wilmot
**[SIGN THE PETITION](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164711/1e3760f0/69b9759b/5f7eb4b5/3101960942/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/s/support-9-11-first-responders?source=em190611&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=")**

body:
Dear Peter,

Today, I travel to Chattanooga to show our support for workers at the Volkswagen plant and the [United Auto Workers](https://act.myngp.com/el/jrIU943EjVD_tp1cDJKmFE7HGQuzZOE-X1tAUFg5A1Y=/8Fatq00KLmqrHtalHTmEjF9IX7DmAUVpRGG5XN28mE4=) labor union as they begin a three day voting period in which Volkswagen workers decide whether or not to become part of the UAW. Tune in throughout the day to our [Facebook](https://act.myngp.com/el/jrIU943EjVD_tp1cDJKmFE7HGQuzZOE-X1tAUFg5A1Y=/iQUgOyW9FiSmCMQzqXJ8zo9Q4alHUOwzinrg0_1Nwtw=), [Twitter](https://act.myngp.com/el/jrIU943EjVD_tp1cDJKmFE7HGQuzZOE-X1tAUFg5A1Y=/0s52oOcChDn9BTPo_DMl-vYnvJWK4-7NWCYVSlASfuQ=), and [Instagram](https://act.myngp.com/el/jrIU943EjVD_tp1cDJKmFE7HGQuzZOE-X1tAUFg5A1Y=/F9Ev3rvWOThfZ7wu5NPJlqsvGI-Mf7cirjL_5OKattM=) for updates.

As I told the [Chattanooga Times Free Press](https://act.myngp.com/el/jrIU943EjVD_tp1cDJKmFE7HGQuzZOE-X1tAUFg5A1Y=/BSMhvroBqp09IXysKU6cYjVL9BeP1ZhS-TT4jpm8wKM=), this vote is about building a positive, partner relationship between Volkswagen and the Tennesseans who work for them in Chattanooga - and ensuring that workers have a seat at the table and a mechanism in which to hold management accountable.

Politicians like Governor Bill Lee and Hamilton County Mayor Jim Coppinger are inserting themselves in the middle of the vote by making it about 'labor vs. management.' This false choice is just another way in which those in powerful positions work to divide us.

In Tennessee, labor unions embody our values of looking out for each other, whether we're white, black or brown, tenth generation or newcomer, blue collar or white.

There is no doubt that Volkswagen has played an invaluable role in the Chattanooga community. But equally as important is ensuring that the jobs they create pay well and that people who work hard can afford their mortgage or rent, medicine, and a safe and dignified retirement.

Unions, like the UAW and so many others, make sure workers and their families have a strong collective voice, a sense of economic security, and a reason to feel good about the future. Their values are Democratic Party values and we support them 100%.

In solidarity,

Mary
\--
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

**PS: The Tennessee Democratic Party has formed a labor caucus. Visit [tndp.org/caucuses](https://act.myngp.com/el/jrIU943EjVD_tp1cDJKmFE7HGQuzZOE-X1tAUFg5A1Y=/O-lCj-V-InUYC4ozr3zQEGC7buRBHhdqENe9NdBkcLY=) to join!**

* * *
**TNDP THREE STAR DINNER & CELEBRATION**

Tickets, tables, and sponsorships for the TNDP Three Star Dinner (coming up fast on Saturday, June 22, in Nashville!) are still available - but not for long...

This year we are so pleased to welcome Sen. Kyrsten Sinema(D-AZ) as our keynote speaker. But that's not all! Congressman Jim Cooper will bring us a special welcome, U.S. Senate candidate James Mackler, will bring us an update from around the state, and we will present the TNDP TRUE GRIT Award to all the members of our intrepid state house and state senate. _This is going to be FUN! _

This false choice is just another way in which those in powerful positions work to divide us. In Tennessee, labor unions embody our values of looking out for each other, whether we're white, black or brown, tenth generation or newcomer, blue collar or white. There is no doubt that Volkswagen has played an invaluable role in the Chattanooga community. But equally as important is ensuring that the jobs they create pay well and that people who work hard can afford their mortgage or rent, medicine, and a safe and dignified retirement. Unions, like the UAW and so many others, make sure workers and their families have a strong collective voice, a sense of economic security, and a reason to feel good about the future. Their values are Democratic Party values and we support them 100%. In solidarity, Mary \-- Mary Mancini Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party PS: The Tennessee Democratic Party has formed a labor caucus. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Three years ago in Orlando
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
We've got more work to do to make sure everyone in the LGBTQ+ community is safe to be who they are and love who they love without having to face the fear of violence. | | |
---
Three years ago today, 49 people were murdered at the Pulse nightclub in Orlando -- an attack on our LGBTQ+ and Latinx communities.

We remember the victims, we grieve with their loved ones, and we honor them with action.

We need commonsense gun reform -- _now_ , before the next mass shooting, but also to stop the daily gun violence on our streets.

And we've got more work to do to make sure everyone in the LGBTQ+ community is safe to be who they are and love who they love without having to face the fear of violence.

The Pulse massacre was in the middle of Pride month. This June, every June, every month, we remember what Pride represents: turning away from darkness and division and turning toward our best selves -- inclusive, strong, united, optimistic, and proud.

America is strongest when we celebrate our diversity -- and when we come together.

That's the message of Pride. That's what I'm thinking about today. And that's what we're fighting for.

Elizabeth

Peter ,

When I left the reserves last April I knew I needed someplace else to direct my energy and service. After I watched MJ Hegar’s video last summer I was inspired to get involved. At the time I didn’t know that in only a year I would be in a similar video, but now it’s the key to us winning this race.
Supporters like you, from across the country, remember Dan Crenshaw from his SNL skit. Now they are chipping in $5 at a time to our race. But if we’re going to compete with Crenshaw and his SuperPACs we’re going to need to go viral. **When we launch our first video, we can do that.**
We have our production team ready to go and we know the script. But if we’re going to make this happen we need to raise a lot of money. In fact, we need to raise over $20,000 before the end of the month. As a public school teacher, I know that’s a lot of money but I wouldn’t be asking you for it if we didn’t need it.
We’ve done the numbers and we know that we can raise at least five times that from the video and grow our movement substantially. There are so many supporters, like yourself, who will chip in and join the team. If we can reach them, we can win. But we can only do that if we raise over $20,000 before the end of the month. **[I know it's a big ask, but can you chip in $25 today to fund our first video?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7467857/70517192/-1594214468?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2I3OWE0Zi00NDhkLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uK0hH7I6oCllXehc6VIZW18BIVyRBd6l3W2VA-laY3g=&refcode=email) **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7467858/70517193/-1594214468?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2I3OWE0Zi00NDhkLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uK0hH7I6oCllXehc6VIZW18BIVyRBd6l3W2VA-laY3g=&refcode=email)

Elisa

name: Andrew Yang
subject: CAMPAIGN UPDATE: Pod Save America, and Progress Towards Our $3.5M Goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| | Friend -- [](http://my.yang2020.com/?e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=061219_pod_save_amer_2&n=1) Hello all, and thank you for your continued support! After a weekend in Iowa speaking alongside the other presidential contenders (well, most of them...), I’m currently finishing up a trip in LA, where I had a full schedule of media interviews. I talked with Cenk Uygur of The Young Turks about the campaign. This wasn't the first time Cenk interviewed me - you can see the first one here: [This 2020 Presidential Candidate Makes A TON Of Sense](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRZEqh54V1DMgF0sfQl7ONgw&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=061219_pod_save_amer_2&n=2). After that, I recorded an episode of Pod Save America. It was exciting to sit down with Tommy Vietor, a veteran of the Obama administration, to discuss my candidacy with their progressive audience. I hear all the cool kids listen to that podcast. There are also a few others that we’ll let you know about when we can :-) The growth in our campaign isn’t just reflected in the media; it’s also reflected in our support. Our social media presence is growing at a rate faster than almost any other candidate in the field. The requirements for the second DNC debates have been released, and we’re well on pace to hitting them. We need 130,000 individual donors - we’re right at 120,000. We also need 400 donors from 20 different states, and we blew past that. It’s a testament to the wide appeal of the Freedom Dividend that we’re receiving such strong support from so many different parts of the country. BUT - we are behind on our goal to double our fundraising from Q1 and raise $3.5 million in Q2. Doubling our fundraising will show that we have the growth and momentum necessary to win the nomination and go on to beat Trump in 2020. Based on internal projections, we’re on pace to raise just under $3 million this quarter. [**If you can, please help us hit our Q2 goal today by donating $23.97, our average donation so far this quarter! If you’re a first-time donor, this will help us with our fundraising goal**** _and_****with qualifying for the second debates.**](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztbuRGBN0vcAK1g-phCZGoObzq-LqG6qBaLeM5FnOh-WfuWP76IrrGKIXkB-60WLS3eo9ZEuY9GHX-uktJ6WoR6Cu97rXYnthphJRIen_TPiQNkY9fhcjVzbxsFQ9QRzwtBqk5vZ_Wetl2JV4j2rsDOZSvWzyuLm1oWVwbdhRFiPQ&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=061219_pod_save_amer_2&n=3) I am deep in debate prep for June, which will be a new high-water mark for the campaign - let’s take advantage of the opportunity that history has given us. It has opened a door - let’s run through it. -Andrew

subject: "It's a Huge Deal" – Iowa Farmers React to President Trump's Order on E15 Fuel
body:
"President Donald Trump came to Council Bluffs to praise farmers, and pledged to continue fighting for them." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=06bf64c54e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **"It's a Huge Deal" – Iowa Farmers React to President Trump's Order on E15 Fuel**

“President Donald Trump came to Council Bluffs to praise farmers, and pledged to continue fighting for them,” José Zozaya reports for KETV. “The president announced year-round sales of E15 fuel. He also signed an executive order to streamline the biotechnology process.”

These new actions will help reduce costs, eliminate delays, and ultimately allow farmers to produce safer, more sustainable crops without excessive interference from Washington. “It’s a huge deal,” said local farmer Bruce Bracker. President Trump is “a businessman that keeps his word.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0cbed049f9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| The Trump Administration unveiled a new initiative yesterday “aimed at giving women a bigger role in global peace and security efforts,” Catherine Lucey reports for [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cfece5d946&e=3ee4985eea). “White House senior adviser Ivanka Trump, the president’s daughter, has been a key champion of the effort and took part in a discussion about it at the Capitol with a bipartisan group of lawmakers.” Ms. Trump said that the Strategy on Women, Peace, and Security “recognizes that women’s participation and empowerment are essential to good defense policy, conflict resolution and post-conflict peace-building efforts.”
---
|
---
| “The acting Homeland Security secretary gave lawmakers a glimpse Tuesday into just how many asylum seekers skip their hearings after being released into the United States -- telling a Senate panel that a recent program found 90 percent miss their court dates,” Adam Shaw reports for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d864112bf1&e=3ee4985eea). “The secretary described authorities as hamstrung by laws that limit how long they can keep migrants in custody.”
---
|
---
| “The Rio Grande Valley sector of the Texas border is currently in custody of more than 8,000 illegal immigrants, nearly three times the intended capacity of 3,363,” Eddie Scarry reports in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=86b008828b&e=3ee4985eea). U.S. Customs and Border Protection warned Monday that America’s border security system will collapse under the weight of mass illegal immigration if no action is taken by Congress. “This is a tragedy and Democrats in Congress refuse to do anything about it. It's exactly how they want our immigration system to work.”
---
|
---
| “USMCA will lead to more jobs, larger paychecks, and cheaper prices for American consumers,” Rep. George Holding (R-NC) writes in [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e15a4e46ad&e=3ee4985eea). “It’s time for Washington to buck up and get this agreement over the finish line. We have before us a once in a generation opportunity to define a new global standard in digital trade, one that positions the United States as the world leader in the digital economy. We can’t afford to let it slip away.”
---

clean_body: "President Donald Trump came to Council Bluffs to praise farmers, and pledged to continue fighting for them." | | | | | | | "It's a Huge Deal" – Iowa Farmers React to President Trump's Order on E15 Fuel “President Donald Trump came to Council Bluffs to praise farmers, and pledged to continue fighting for them,” José Zozaya reports for KETV. “The president announced year-round sales of E15 fuel. He also signed an executive order to streamline the biotechnology process.” These new actions will help reduce costs, eliminate delays, and ultimately allow farmers to produce safer, more sustainable crops without excessive interference from Washington. “It’s a huge deal,” said local farmer Bruce Bracker. President Trump is “a businessman that keeps his word.” | | The Trump Administration unveiled a new initiative yesterday “aimed at giving women a bigger role in global peace and security efforts,” Catherine Lucey reports for . “White House senior adviser Ivanka Trump, the president’s daughter, has been a key champion of the effort and took part in a discussion about it at the Capitol with a bipartisan group of lawmakers.” Ms. Trump said that the Strategy on Women, Peace, and Security “recognizes that women’s participation and empowerment are essential to good defense policy, conflict resolution and post-conflict peace-building efforts.” | | “The acting Homeland Security secretary gave lawmakers a glimpse Tuesday into just how many asylum seekers skip their hearings after being released into the United States -- telling a Senate panel that a recent program found 90 percent miss their court dates,” Adam Shaw reports for . “The secretary described authorities as hamstrung by laws that limit how long they can keep migrants in custody.” | | “The Rio Grande Valley sector of the Texas border is currently in custody of more than 8,000 illegal immigrants, nearly three times the intended capacity of 3,363,” Eddie Scarry reports in the . U.S. Customs and Border Protection warned Monday that America’s border security system will collapse under the weight of mass illegal immigration if no action is taken by Congress. “This is a tragedy and Democrats in Congress refuse to do anything about it. name: Teresa
subject: Remembering Pulse
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/74264/images/tt2020%20email%20header.png]
Dear Friend,

Three years ago, a man with an assault weapon murdered 49 innocent people and wounded 53 others who were celebrating Latin Night at the LGBTQ-friendly Pulse nightclub in Orlando.

As we celebrate Pride month and remember the victims, survivors, and their loved ones, we recognize the courage and unconditional love of the LGBTQ community. Even today, they put their lives at risk simply by expressing their sexual orientations and gender identities. And a fact of the matter is that whether it’s a nightclub, an outdoor concert, a house of worship, or a school, all of our lives are at risk due to gun violence and hateful ideologies.

So today we remember the 49 victims and 53 survivors of this deadly shooting and resolve ourselves to action. We should push for common-sense measures to reduce gun violence, like passing Extreme Risk Protection Orders and closing background check loopholes. We should guarantee equality no matter one’s sexual orientation and treat Latinx communities with dignity. This wasn’t just an attack on one group or city. It was an attack on all of us.

When FDA policy prohibits gay and bisexual men from donating their blood to save lives in their own community – as it did after the Pulse shooting and still does today – it puts lives at risk.

When U.S. embassies are prohibited from flying the rainbow flag, it suppresses the voices of people who have been fighting for equality since Stonewall and well before.

When the military bans transgender soldiers, among the less than 1% of Americans who voluntarily raise their hands to defend our country, it’s a threat to our national security.

When the government tries to erase the identities of trans individuals, fails to protect LGTBQ youth, and associates with regimes that punish people for being gay, we cannot sit silently.

When LGBTQ couples are prohibited from adopting children, it undermines family values.

When trans women of color are murdered in cold blood, none of us are safe.

We remember Pulse. And we recognize all of the barriers that the LGBTQ community continues to face. Together, we will continue to fight for justice, equality, and safety for us all.

Yours truly,

Teresa

body:
| | | Hello,

The Boston Pride Parade is something I look forward to every year.

Boston is the cradle of LGBTQ+ activism and inclusion. We are revolutionaries, and we are wicked PROUD of that!

[](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dd32/693b8b0a/59328fbe/72de884c/1736226985/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyNyJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-pride-2019?refcode=EM-061219_1&amount=27&recurring=true")
We had a very enthusiastic group who showed up and marched in support of all those who are fighting for LGBTQ rights across the country.

This fight is more important now than ever.

President Trump pretends to be an ally, but his policies show nothing but cruelty to the LGBTQ+ community.

From banning transgendered servicemembers from the military to opposing the Equality Act to undoing discrimination protections at HHS and other agencies, Trump has one goal: **take away the rights of LGBTQ+ Americans.**

That's why it's so important that we have members of Congress who will stand up to fight for LGBTQ+ rights -- a commitment I've made and will keep.

[_**Will you give $27 or more to my campaign before midnight to help me continue to stand up against President Trump and his cruel administration?**_](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dd32/693b8b0a/59328fbe/72de884c/1736226985/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyNyJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-pride-2019?refcode=EM-061219_1&amount=27&recurring=true")

**[DONATE NOW](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dd32/693b8b0a/59328fbe/72de884c/1736226985/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyNyJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-pride-2019?refcode=EM-061219_1&amount=27&recurring=true")**
Let's stay in this fight,

Ed

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must reach 130,000 donors this summer to secure his spot on the Democratic debate stage.

Julian hasn't qualified yet, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money. Will you help him get there?

| **Just Announced:
Battleground Indiana Training Lineup!**
---
| Dear Indiana Republicans,

Just announced! With our 2019 candidate training seminar -- [Battleground Indiana: Winning Indiana's Cities & Towns](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=90fce504f5&e=1acd9bb3d6) \-- approaching THIS WEEKEND, **we're excited to reveal the full lineup of breakout sessions and speakers at the big event.** You can view the [full list of breakout sessions here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=14f5494112&e=1acd9bb3d6).

And with registration closing this Thursday, you should [book your spot NOW](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bf0fdd52f9&e=1acd9bb3d6)! [\--> Register NOW to secure your spot! (individual) <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=577de39c72&e=1acd9bb3d6)
[\--> Register NOW to secure your spot! (organization) <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8b30c2bbdd&e=1acd9bb3d6) Here's a quick run-down of some of the breakout sessions this Saturday:
* **Communications & Messaging**
* **Identifying Your Target Voters**
* **Write Your Campaign Plan**
* **Grassroots & the Ground Game**
* **Campaign Finance & Fundraising**
* **And MORE!**

If you're running for office this year, thinking about running soon, or working on a campaign, this is an event you won't want to miss. [The seminar](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=48e7258589&e=1acd9bb3d6) \-- designed with our 2019 Republican municipal candidates and campaigns in mind -- will be this **Saturday, June 15, at the University of Indianapolis.** Registration opens at 7:30 a.m.

In addition to these fantastic breakout sessions, you'll also have an opportunity to sign up for a one-on-one media training (_learn how to handle the toughest interview!_) and a door/phone app training session (_use the latest technology to help you contact voters!_).

As a reminder, [your registration](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=15520bc74c&e=1acd9bb3d6) includes everything you'll need for the day -- breakfast, lunch, materials and training sessions. **You'll also receive admission to our special mayoral candidate reception that evening headlined by Governor Eric Holcomb and me, with all funds raised during the reception directly supporting our 2019 municipal efforts.**

With this great lineup of breakout sessions (you're going to want to check out the [full list here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=577afd5e01&e=1acd9bb3d6)), this is an event you're not going to want to miss. I'd recommend [securing your tickets ASAP](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2dfe57d795&e=1acd9bb3d6), as tickets are going quickly! If you have any questions, please reach out at [info@indiana.gop](mailto:info@indiana.gop), and we'll be in touch soon.

Thanks,
Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party

P.S. [Register NOW](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=99117386d1&e=1acd9bb3d6), and make sure that you don't miss out on learning about the latest campaign strategies and tactics. We're dedicated to making sure Republicans win BIG this year and next year across Indiana, and winning starts with you.

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: 51 of our supporters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
We've got incredible donors in every corner of the country. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717f6/691c9bd/6ddf13f1/11a4d1d0/637613500/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

I'm asking for your help before tonight.

Tonight at midnight is my final chance to qualify for the first presidential debates. To do that, **I 'm asking everyone reading this message to declare they're a part of this team by chipping in any amount possible--even $1 will do the job.** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717f6/691c9bd/6ddf13f1/11a4d1d1/637613500/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130k-new-donor?refcode=em_fr_20190612_JH_20190612-fr-JH-51supporters-newsup_newsup_b1&recurring=auto&amount=1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** The DNC wants to see that every candidate on the debate stage has a strong base of support that can potentially take on Donald Trump. But when I saw the list of our official supporters, I saw much more.

**Team Hick is a true cross-section of our nation. You are people who work with your hands; with computers and numbers; in classrooms, churches, and out in nature. Many of you are from my tribe: geologists and earth scientists, restaurateurs and brewers, servers, bartenders. (More than a few musicians, too!)**

Some of you are retired or have opted to stay at home. And some of you are folks who are in need of employment--something that's front of mind for me as I think about how to renew the American workforce and rebuild the middle class.

**Below is a small glimpse into our campaign: a round-up of 51 of our supporters, one from every state in the Union as well as Washington, D.C. This team is incomparable --before tonight's deadline, will you join it?** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717f6/691c9bd/6ddf13f1/11a4d1ce/637613500/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130k-new-donor?refcode=em_fr_20190612_JH_20190612-fr-JH-51supporters-newsup_newsup_b2&recurring=auto&amount=1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** A pilot in Alaska
A software consultant in Alabama
A musician from Arkansas
A graphic designer from Arizona
A warehouse manager in California
A smoke jumper in Colorado
A stay-at-home mom in Connecticut
An engineer in Delaware
An antique dealer in Florida
A forklift operator in Georgia
A physician in Hawaii

A registered nurse in Idaho

A teacher in Kansas

A chef in Massachusetts

A plumber in Michigan

A sawmiller in Missouri
A farmer in Mississippi
A professor in Montana
An ESL instructor in North Carolina
A resident assistant in North Dakota
A bar owner in Nebraska
An inventor in New Hampshire
A pediatrician in New Jersey
A ballet instructor in New Mexico
A programmer in Nevada
A tour guide in New York
A preschool owner in Ohio
A tax preparer in Oklahoma
An air traffic controller in Oregon
A veterinarian in Pennsylvania
An attorney in Rhode Island
An esthetician in South Carolina
A retail employee in South Dakota
A video producer in Tennessee
A forester in Texas
A firefighter in Utah
A bus driver in Virginia
A dental hygienist in Vermont
A landscape architect in Washington
An electrician in Wisconsin
A manager in West Virginia
A coder in Wyoming
And a statistician in Washington, DC Thank you,

John **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717f6/691c9bd/6ddf13f1/11a4d1cf/637613500/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130k-new-donor?refcode=em_fr_20190612_JH_20190612-fr-JH-51supporters-newsup_newsup_b3&recurring=auto&amount=1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper 2020 team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717f6/691c9bd/6ddf13f1/11a4d1cc/637613500/VEsD/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717f6/691c9bd/6ddf13f1/11a4d1cd/637613500/VEsA/ "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717f6/691c9bd/6ddf13f1/11a4d1ca/637613500/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717f6/691c9bd/6ddf13f1/11a4d1cb/637613500/VEsO/ "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717f6/691c9bd/6ddf13f1/11a4d1c8/637613500/VEsP/ "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--but if at any point you'd like to opt out, you can do so right [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717f6/691c9bd/6ddf13f1/11a4d1c9/637613500/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please [_**update your information here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717f6/691c9bd/6ddf13f1/11a4d1cc/637613500/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in").

name: [petition enclosed] via Voter Protection Project
subject: Mississippi conservatives did WHAT?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | Last time we checked, it's 2019 -- not 1890. But Jim Crow has still got a hold of Mississippi's government. The upcoming governor's election could be a crucial turning point for this deep red state- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Peter -- Last time we checked, it's 2019 -- not 1890. **But Jim Crow has still got a hold of Mississippi 's government.** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0744/72412298/428b2839/6101f625/1305283439/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/ms_voterprotection?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190612_Mississippi_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190612_Mississippi_U1_X1") The upcoming governor's election could be a crucial turning point for this deep red state -- four-term Attorney General Jim Hood,**the only Democrat elected to statewide office in Mississippi in the last 16 years, is leading in recent polls.** But experts say he is likely to lose because of the state's racist election rules intended to **dilute and suppress the power of black voters.** Mississippi is the ONLY state in the nation that requires a candidate to win both the popular vote AND a majority of the state's heavily gerrymandered districts. If a candidate can't do both, the Republican-controlled House gets to choose who wins. (Hint: it's not going to be the Democrat) This law is blatantly discriminatory and unconstitutional:**[Join the Voter Protection Project in calling for the repeal of this racist law Peter >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0744/72412298/428b2839/6101f624/1305283439/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/ms_voterprotection?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+Join+the+Voter+Protection+Project+in+cal&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190612_Mississippi_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190612_Mississippi_U1_X1")** | | | [Add your voice >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0744/72412298/428b2839/6101f627/1305283439/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/ms_voterprotection?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+voice+gtgt&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190612_Mississippi_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190612_Mississippi_U1_X1")
---
**It isn 't fair, and it wasn't designed to be.** White Southern politicians created these rules to ensure that newly enfranchised African American citizens _**would never have an equal opportunity**_ to participate in the political process or be elected to office.
The stakes are higher than ever - the winning party gets control of the state's redistricting process in 2021. Democrats would have the opportunity to fight back against GOP gerrymandering and give power back to the people.
[**With this election, voters have the chance to rewrite the disgraceful legacy of racist Southern lawmakers. Sign your name to tell Mississippi lawmakers that every citizen's vote should count equally >>**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0744/72412298/428b2839/6101f626/1305283439/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/ms_voterprotection?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+With+this+election+voters+have+the+chanc&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190612_Mississippi_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190612_Mississippi_U1_X1")
| | [Equal Rights = Equal Say](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0744/72412298/428b2839/6101f629/1305283439/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/ms_voterprotection?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+Equal+Rights++Equal+Say&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190612_Mississippi_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190612_Mississippi_U1_X1")
---
\-- Voter Protection Project

| [Voter Protection Project](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0744/72412298/428b2839/6101f628/1305283439/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=6+-+Voter+Protection+Project&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190612_Mississippi_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190612_Mississippi_U1_X1")

We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0744/72412298/428b2839/6101f62a/1305283439/VEsO/ "https://voterprotect.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=8+-+click+here&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190612_Mississippi_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190612_Mississippi_U1_X1")
If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, [click here.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0744/72412298/428b2839/6101f62d/1305283439/VEsP/ "https://voterprotect.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=9+-+click+here&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190612_Mississippi_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190612_Mississippi_U1_X1")

Win a chance for you and a friend to be flown out to meet Elizabeth (with free airfare, hotel, and drinks). Chip in any amount to be automatically entered for a chance to win.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e08b/45c30650/16ff47fdb/6698a142/2710965928/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImdyYWItYS1kcmluay13aXRoLWV3IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDYxMmVtMi1mdWxsLWIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/grab-a-drink-with-ew?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190612em2-full-b")**

But if you win, you can order whatever drink you'd like -- hot, cold, caffeinated, decaf, sweetened, unsweetened, sparkling, still, anything (the world is yours).

And you'll be able to talk with Elizabeth about what issues matter most to you, why you're in this fight, and anything you want her to know.

subject: real Americans, not special interests
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conole for Congress
body:
| [](conoleforcongress.com)
---

| | In 2017, John Katko voted for Trump's tax bill, which increased our deficit by giving trillion dollar tax cuts to corporations and the ultra-wealthy.

**Heartbreakingly, the legislation also significantly raised taxes for working-class families receiving death benefits because a parent died in combat.**

When I'm elected, I promise to fight to make sure that the legislation that gets through Congress helps real Americans, not special interests who act like they can buy our government.

[**Add your name here to demand that John Katko apologize to every family who lost a soldier and are paying more taxes thanks to his vote.**](https://conole.bsd. "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/sign-on-katko-vote?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+Add+your+name+here+to+demand+that+John+K&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_RDX_190612_1_1&source=FC_EM_PT_RDX_190612_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_PT_RDX_190612_1_1")

Our urgent mission is to build a grassroots campaign that can win in November so that we can get to work serving the people and fighting against bills like this.

To make that a reality, we all need to stand together. That starts with taking action.

[**Sign here to join me in taking a stand against John Katko 's vote to raise taxes for families who lost a soldier in combat so that the wealthiest Americans could get a tax cut they didn't need.**](https://conole.bsd. "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/sign-on-katko-vote?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2+-+Sign+here+to+join+me+in+taking+a+stand+a&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_RDX_190612_1_1&source=FC_EM_PT_RDX_190612_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_PT_RDX_190612_1_1")

Yours in service,

Francis |
---|---|---

A fourth-generation Syracusan and Iraq War veteran, he has dedicated his life to service and sacrifice. | Dear Friend,
Your commitment to this campaign means the world to Heather and me.
Six months ago we started this campaign for governor and we haven't stopped since. We've shook hands, spoke to packed rooms, debated and asked voters to honor us with their vote.
But we can't stop now with less than 2 months to go in this election.
After last week's debate, there is no doubt our momentum is stronger than ever. This momentum we are seeing is because of people like you - and the fact that I am giving Mississippians an alternative to another career politician.
That is why I am reaching out to you first.
You see, these next two months are critical to our campaign and it is important we continue to keep our momentum going, as the request for yard signs are more than we have on hand.
Please help us spread the word and momentum by [making a donation today towards our 48 hour fundraising goal.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HNcMZ5UqSVWPf48tdzrBNcaISnWqaQTkUY3CDQwII5UPB22VBjqHz_HYMdSXoeh653Z_fywA3cT-EAtVGxV83HxfukrJPhr7qgBeQXTfp2ebDbGSRRJC7xQ7yuD1UVBz2o3TNVaIuk4t82CURagRtHLfQvptV6IYlLwX968GRVRXxwpGw1ZEpJh2EvbZSSpRLi2KtHPrFzhZgJ4Nu5C3axjZDEtEvQiV&c=52jLKUFRrXrNKS4NcGUSvl_g0MxWwBQKDxyeAQwhwCC7uqwttYWIdw==&ch=kOJ8zfyiMVNfQBb4Sz1_3lv6oZAeJ3kdlMUg7mcblc6aEKkSXN0brA==)

body:
A thousand feet above the White House this afternoon, a cutting-edge F-35 Joint Strike Fighter jet put on a dazzling demonstration for... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=38f4257889&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • June 12, 2019
---
| | |
# **Historic F-35 White House flyover headlines Polish visit**

**A thousand feet above** the White House this afternoon, a cutting-edge F-35 Joint Strike Fighter jet put on a dazzling demonstration for President Donald J. Trump, First Lady Melania Trump, Polish President Andrzej Duda, and Mrs. Agata Kornhauser-Duda.

**The special and rare show** was part of the Polish leader’s warm welcome in Washington today—and a fitting way to honor Poland’s recent decision to purchase 32 American-made F-35 planes, replacing its post-Soviet fleet with state-of-the-art aircraft.
**🎬** **Watch** : [The U.S.–Poland alliance is stronger than ever before!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1ad8efabbb&e=3ee4985eea)
**Speaking with reporters** earlier, President Trump called the F-35 “the world’s greatest fighter jet” and the “most advanced plane, probably, anywhere in the world.”

**Poland is an essential ally** , an exemplary member of NATO, and has long been a friend of the United States. Its troops stood shoulder-to-shoulder with American service members in both Afghanistan and Iraq. “This year as our nations mark 100 years of diplomatic relations, the U.S.–Polish alliance is stronger by far than ever before,” President Trump said during a joint press conference in the Rose Garden today.

**After 1989** , Poland transitioned to a market economy as the Soviet empire collapsed across Eastern Europe. In the three decades since, it has become an important trading partner for the United States, accounting for $13.4 billion in two-way trade in goods last year—a record high. America increased its exports to Poland by more than $800 million in 2018.

**Today, Poland** is a model European ally for the United States. Its government is a vocal opponent of Russian-backed energy projects that would create greater dependence on Moscow across Europe. Poland also sets an example for other NATO partners, meeting the alliance’s target to commit more than 2 percent of GDP to defense spending.

[Watch: President Trump and President Duda hold a joint press conference.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0b2f863063&e=3ee4985eea)

**An enduring partnership** : [Poland today is a model ally for the United States](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=89f94e73a1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Video of the day: President Trump visits farmers in Iowa**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3c58863da9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **Yesterday,** at the Southwest Iowa Renewable Energy Plant, President Trump delivered welcome news to America’s farming community.

**“Under the previous administration,** our leaders rejected American energy and they rejected ethanol,” the President told the crowd. With an executive order yesterday, President Trump ended an outdated ban on summertime sales of E15 fuel—eliminating another burdensome regulation on American industry.

**“It’s a huge deal,”** one Iowa farmer said.

**“Throughout our history** , America’s farmers have always been there to keep our country strong and independent and free,” President Trump said. “And that is why, every day of my presidency, we will never stop fighting for our farmers.”

[See how Iowa farmers reacted to President Trump's order on E15 fuel](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d77488df4d&e=3ee4985eea).

|

|

name: Amy O'Rourke
subject: Another great weekend on the road
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

I just returned home from another great weekend on the road. I flew into
Iowa on Thursday night, missing the Easterseals fundraiser I was hoping to
attend because of flight delays. But the rest of my first trip to the
state did not disappoint. We toured Matt and Pat’s family farm, learning
about the interplay of markets and federal policy that would allow small
farmers to be profitable and ensure the long term viability of the water
and land. I was able to meet their herd of horses and mules, which I
loved. It reminded me of the ranch I grew up on. I only wish I had been
able to go for a ride!

[1]Matt and Pat’s family farm

On Saturday morning, Beto and I ran in the second annual Fun Pride 5K. JD
Scholten set a fast pace that Beto seemed comfortable with, but far faster
than I usually run. I managed to keep up and forced myself to shift into
high gear at the end to come in just a few seconds ahead of Beto. Getting
exercise, meeting others in the race, and being in such a beautiful
setting along the Des Moines River was a great way to start the day.

After the run, some Casey’s pizza and a quick shower, we joined an
immigration round table at Grand View University. I was particularly
struck by a comment made by Monica, a Dreamer who sat to my right. She
said that when submitting her paperwork for legal status through the Dream
Act, she thought she would just be helping herself. She quickly realized,
she was helping her whole family. She was able to get a driver’s license,
so her family could safely (with car insurance) count on a ride to/from
work, school, and shopping. Her family finally had someone that could
apply for a loan to buy a house. She could get a job that allowed her
family to have access to health care. By bringing her out of the shadows,
she was able to invest in a meaningful way in her community, and she
imagined the magnitude of that impact if all Dreamers and those who are
undocumented in her community could do the same.

Like usual, we also drove to all parts of the state to hold town halls. I
was able to introduce myself in Ottumwa, Knoxville, Williamsburg, and
Clinton. Solid crowds kindly welcomed us at each. We met Reverend and
First Lady Whitfield’s congregation at Mount Carmel Baptist Church in
Waterloo. Right after, we recorded some videos to help our fundraising
program (and, by the way, [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17815?refcode=ema20190612-36153&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=36153%2E444211%2EeaCcuF ]we'd love it if you could pitch in with $5 or
$10).

We attended Iowa’s Democratic Hall of Fame Dinner, where nineteen of the
presidential candidates had a chance to speak. Beto spoke last, and we
definitely felt that pressure of being the last of 19 speakers! I
appreciated that the 1000+ people there seemed to be in agreement about
one thing — winning in November 2020. Each candidate was cheered on and
treated with respect by others’ supporters. And I had the chance to meet
Senator Kamala Harris and her husband, Doug Emhoff, who were so gracious
and kind.

A highlight for me was the campaign office kickoff in Cedar Rapids. We
were joined by those that had already signed up to volunteer. Some had
spent that whole weekend knocking on doors! Some had met Beto before.
Others had not. There were more people than could fit in the space, so the
people and music moved outside. It felt like the early days of the Senate
race when we were building out a massive coalition of dedicated volunteers
who were the unstoppable force behind the campaign. I loved meeting
Cassie, Gina (who gave me a chew toy for our pup, Artemis), Grant, Quinn,
and so many others.

Beto and I went in different directions today, but I can’t wait to be on
the road again. I feel like our extended family is growing beyond the
borders of Texas, and it’s great to be out there with you.

See you on the road soon,

Amy
PS: We mean it when we say that trips like these aren't possible without
you.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17815?refcode=ema20190612-36153&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=36153%2E444211%2EeaCcuF ]Every dollar you give the campaign is a dollar we spend making sure we
get to meet more people like this, and meeting more people means winning
more votes. If you can, please donate to our campaign. Every $5, $10, or
$20 makes a big difference.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17815?refcode=ema20190612-36153&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=36153%2E444211%2EeaCcuF ]Contribute $3 »

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=36153%2E444211%2EeaCcuF

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Why I call myself a democratic socialist
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
Ask yourself this question.

# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1679%2E150750%2EVdUufy)
Sisters, Brothers, and Friends -
While the Bill of Rights protects us from the tyranny of an oppressive government, many in the establishment would like the American people to submit to the tyranny of oligarchs, multinational corporations, Wall Street banks, and billionaires.
In 1944, President Franklin Delano Roosevelt proposed an economic bill of rights, because he knew that there cannot be true freedom without economic security. He was not able to enact it before his death. Seventy-five years later, that job falls to us.
**That is why I am proposing we complete the unfinished work of FDR and the Democratic Party by putting forth a 21st Century Economic Bill of Rights.** These rights include:
* Quality health care
* A complete education
* A good job that pays a living wage
* Affordable housing
* A secure retirement
* A clean environment

I am asking for your support for this 21st Century Economic Bill of Rights. Will you add your name to say you endorse these rights?
**[Please add your name to support our 21st Century Economic Bill of Rights to guarantee a living wage, quality health care, a complete education, affordable housing, a secure retirement, and a clean environment for every person in our country.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_econbillrights/?source=em190612-1-60-green&refcode2=1679.150750.VdUufy&t=6&akid=1679%2E150750%2EVdUufy)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_econbillrights/?source=em190612-1-60-green&refcode2=1679.150750.VdUufy&t=7&akid=1679%2E150750%2EVdUufy)
These are my values, and that is why I call myself a democratic socialist.
What I believe is that the American people deserve freedom – true freedom. Freedom is an often-used word, but it’s time we took a hard look at what that word actually means.
Ask yourself: what does it actually mean to be free?
Are you truly free if you are unable to go to a doctor when you are sick, or face financial bankruptcy when you leave the hospital?
Are you truly free if you cannot afford the prescription drug you need to stay alive?
Are you truly free when you spend half of your limited income on housing, and are forced to borrow money from a payday lender at 200% interest rates?
Are you truly free if you are 70 years old and forced to work because you lack a pension or enough money to retire?
Are you truly free if you are unable to attend college or a trade school because your family lacks the income?
Are you truly free if you are forced to work 60 or 80 hours a week because you can’t find a job that pays a living wage?
Are you truly free if you are a mother or father with a newborn baby but you are forced to go back to work immediately after the birth because you lack paid family leave?
Are you truly free if you are a small business owner or family farmer who is driven out by the monopolistic practices of big business?
Are you truly free if you are a veteran, who put your life on the line to defend this country, and now sleep out on the streets?
To me, the answer to those questions, in the wealthiest nation on earth, is no, you are not free.
It is time for the American people to stand up and fight for their rights to freedom, human dignity, and security.
**[Please add your name to endorse our 21st Century Economic Bill of Rights.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_econbillrights/?source=em190612-1-60-green&refcode2=1679.150750.VdUufy&t=8&akid=1679%2E150750%2EVdUufy)
Thank you for being a part of our movement.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**Add your name if you believe every person in our country deserves:
* Quality health care
* A complete education
* A good job that pays a living wage
* Affordable housing
* A secure retirement
* A clean environment

You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=11&akid=1679%2E150750%2EVdUufy). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=12&refcode2=1679_150750_VdUufy&akid=1679%2E150750%2EVdUufy).

### [Faux Impeachment](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiiuhkit-kujkulhluu-j/)
The Democrats in Congress have a big problem. Their base, the people who are hardcore Democrats, and vote Democrat every election come hell or highwater, hate Donald Trump, and want him impeached. Most of the rest of America, meaning virtually all Republicans, and the majority of independents, are sick of talking about it, and think it's a big waste of time and money. So what are Democrats to do?

Click the link below to read this week's blog about it. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiiuhkit-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts

### [Why China MUST Be Defeated](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiiuhkit-kujkulhluu-d/)
I read a column by Dick Morris over the weekend which I have to say was one of the most insightful and best written I've read in a long time. In my blog this week I'm going to sum up his key points for you

Click the link below to read more. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiiuhkit-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiiuhkit-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Why We Can't Trust the Democrats](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiiuhkit-kujkulhluu-u/)
Democrats, mostly those running for President this time around, are saying things which ought to give voters cause to be concerned about just how far to the left they are veering. I'm on the blog discussing it today.

Click the link below to read more. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiiuhkit-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiiuhkit-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Are More Republicans Going to Turn on Trump?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiiuhkit-kujkulhluu-n/)
Over the weekend, a Republican Congressman got A LOT of attention (it wasn't me.) Justin Amash of Michigan announced that in his opinion "President Trump has engaged in impeachable conduct." I'm on the blog talking about this today.
